title: Invisible Item Frame
description: Create invisible frames in the workbench without using third-party commands, right in survival!
body:
**Invisible Item Frame** - adds a recipe for an invisible frame so that the player can get it legally in survival mode. The player can create either a regular invisible frame or a glow invisible frame, the only difference is in the frame.

![Screenshot recipe invisible item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/690f8a6f810be5dcc6b0bb9120ac5da5a4085cc4.png) ![Screenshot recipe invisible glow item frame](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/135566bfd02ece817f7ad3b27036ead2a41688f8.png)
